Query.Sql: with gy_surgery as ( select Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, unnest( [ [Record -> '$.Treatment.Surgery'], Record -> '$.Treatment[*].Surgery' ], recursive := true ) as Surgery from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901 where type = 'GY' ), gy_proc as ( select NhsNumber, Surgery ->> '$.ProcedureDate' as ProcedureDate, unnest( [ [Surgery ->> '$.ProcedureOpcs.@code'], Surgery ->> '$.ProcedureOpcs[*].@code' ], recursive := true ) as ProcedureOpcs from gy_surgery where Surgery is not null ) select distinct NhsNumber, ProcedureOpcs, ProcedureDate from gy_proc where NhsNumber is not null and ProcedureOpcs is not null and ProcedureDate is not null;

Explanation.Description: Patient procedure other than the primary procedure (OPCS). Recommended to record multiple patient procedures where applicable.
Date relevant to the activity for the procedure date.
